scan_qr: Scan the QR Code to connect the bot to your account:
qr_setup_info: Creates a QR Code for you to scan inside the WhatsApp client. Generally faster, but requires a device to run this bot and another to scan the code.
pairing_setup_info: Creates an 8-digit code for you to manually type inside the WhatsApp client. Slower and requires your phone number, but does not require another device.
pairing_code_needs_number:
To use the pairing code, you'll need to type your Whatsapp number below.
The number must have no spaces, hyphens, or a leading + sign.
(e.g., 12345678901)
 >
pairing_code_notice: The number must have no spaces, hyphens, or a leading + sign! (e.g., 12345678901)
pair: Type this Pairing code to connect the bot to WhatsApp:
new_session: A new session was made. Connect it to it.
tries_exceeded: Tried three times, but failed to connect on all of them. Deleting your session folder...
connection_method_ask: What connection method do you want to use?
